summary: This is an extremely brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky introduces a new discussion group dedicated to Delphi programming questions, hosted on the Fog Creek discussion forums. The post contains virtually no substantive content beyond the link and one-line description. It serves purely as a signal boost for the new forum.
key_points: Joel launched a dedicated Delphi programming discussion group on the Fog Creek forums
The post reflects the era when Joel actively cultivated developer communities around specific technologies
Delphi (Borland's Object Pascal IDE) was still a relevant enough technology in 2002 to warrant its own discussion forum
key_insight: This is a minimal announcement post with no substantive content to analyze beyond the existence of a new Delphi discussion forum.
